Interface ITerrainToRasterFunctionArguments

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.DatasourcesRaster
Assembly
ESRI.Server.DatasourcesRaster.dll

Provides access to members that control terrain to raster conversion.

[Guid("C21EC208-CC2F-4E31-A3FF-272D1812C9C1")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface ITerrainToRasterFunctionArguments

Properties

CacheMaxNumSurfaces

Maximum number of different surfaces kept in this cache folder.

int CacheMaxNumSurfaces { get; set; }

Property Value

int

Examples

Sample Snippet

CacheRasterZTolerance

Z tolerance for rasters in the image cache folder, used for compression.

double CacheRasterZTolerance { get; set; }

Property Value

double

Examples

Sample Snippet

CellWidth

Cell width.

double CellWidth { get; set; }

Property Value

double

Examples

Sample Snippet

Terrain

The input terrain or terrain name.

object Terrain { get; set; }

Property Value

object

Examples

Sample Snippet

TinToRasterInterpolationType

Tin to raster interpolation type (how to rasterize the tin: Linear or NN).

esriSurfaceInterpolationType TinToRasterInterpolationType { get; set; }

Property Value

esriSurfaceInterpolationType
